data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for follow-up reminders for non-signers, as stated in the linked use case. However, the evidence does not include any checks or API reads that confirm the implementation of this feature. The absence of concrete evidence regarding the functionality of follow-up reminders indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of follow-up reminders for non-signers functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
